chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-5387 of 2021 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No.4982/22 2. For hearing of Misc. No.22542 /21 3. For hearing of main case. 11.09.2025. Ms. Humaira Jatoi, Counsel for SBCA. ------------------------------------ This is an old case of 2021 which is over 04 years ago. It was last taken up on 26.01.2024 which is also over 11⁄2 years ago and since then learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today despite lapse of 11⁄2 years learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has no serious interest in pursuing this old petition which is hereby dismissed on account of non-prosecution alongwith pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
